policy.purpose: Small reproducible engineering scenarios for demos, onboarding, dogfood, and regression planning.
policy.claim_boundary: Scenario artifacts are review and regression evidence, not production certification or design sign-off.
policy.main_flow_safety: Catalog-only metadata; it must not mutate CAD, run solvers, or change runtime behavior.

scenarios.title: Cantilever CAD to CAE value demo
scenarios.description: Single connected cantilever driven through CAD creation, face-pointer selection, approval-gated CalculiX execution, FRD-derived fields, and an evidence report.
honesty_boundaries: Requires real Gmsh/CalculiX for the real demo path.
Synthetic fallback fields are a failed demo condition.
scenarios.owner_notes: This is the strongest value story, but the real solver path remains operator-run and skip-gated.

scenarios.title: Fixture plate with holes, fastener semantics, and material assignment
scenarios.description: Plate or fixture scenario that demonstrates recognized holes, standard-part semantics, BOM output, and explicit material assignment.
honesty_boundaries: Standard-part semantics do not imply physical preload or contact modeling.
BOM evidence is semantic/export evidence, not procurement validation.
Material assignment must be explicit or reported as missing.
scenarios.owner_notes: CI-regression scenario over real bd_warehouse fastener construction when dependencies are available plus pure BOM export checks.

scenarios.title: Mass-reduction design target comparison
scenarios.description: Parameterized design-study scenario that evaluates candidate-local evidence, ranks variants, and accepts a derived winner without overwriting baseline geometry.
honesty_boundaries: Demo metrics are candidate-local static or neutral evidence unless a solver run is explicitly present.
Baseline geometry remains unchanged unless explicitly promoted.
scenarios.owner_notes: Already has strong CI coverage; future work is a human-readable pack README.

scenarios.title: Mesh diagnostics failure and recovery
scenarios.description: Scenario that intentionally starts with missing or weak mesh/setup evidence, reports blockers before solver execution, then documents the recovery path.
honesty_boundaries: Missing mesh/deck/load/constraint evidence must block or warn before solver claims.
Recovery docs must distinguish preflight success from solver success.
No synthetic solver success may be counted as real evidence.
scenarios.owner_notes: CI-regression scenario for readiness, mesh/deck diagnostics, blocked paths, and recovery guidance; real solver execution remains a separate operator-run path.

scenarios.title: Sizing sweep with ranked candidates
scenarios.description: Open-loop sizing scenario that sweeps bounded parameters, writes ranked candidates, and keeps the result advisory.
honesty_boundaries: Analytical or fixture metrics must not be represented as solver evidence.
scenarios.owner_notes: Already testable with a short operator README; expected screenshots remain optional future polish.
